description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Create a single plant observation dated exactly three days ago at an urban botanical garden, with abundance set to 10–50 individuals, habitat as an urban lawn, and assign it to a 2024 citywide urban plant survey project.
tasks.name: Create a single plant observation dated exactly three days ago at an urban botanical garden, with abundance set to 10–50 individuals, habitat as an urban lawn, and assign it to a 2024 citywide urban plant survey project.
tasks.description: Create a single plant observation dated exactly three days ago at an urban botanical garden, with abundance set to 10–50 individuals, habitat as an urban lawn, and assign it to a 2024 citywide urban plant survey project.

tasks.instruction: From recent data, bookmark the first bird observation found in the last 30 days within 10 km of a riverside city park that reports at least 6 individuals.
tasks.name: From recent data, bookmark the first bird observation found in the last 30 days within 10 km of a riverside city park that reports at least 6 individuals.
tasks.description: From recent data, bookmark the first bird observation found in the last 30 days within 10 km of a riverside city park that reports at least 6 individuals.

tasks.instruction: Among butterfly species in the insects group, follow the one that has the higher total observation count, using alphabetical order of common name as a tiebreaker if needed.
tasks.name: Among butterfly species in the insects group, follow the one that has the higher total observation count, using alphabetical order of common name as a tiebreaker if needed.
tasks.description: Among butterfly species in the insects group, follow the one that has the higher total observation count, using alphabetical order of common name as a tiebreaker if needed.

tasks.instruction: Join a 2024 citywide pollinator monitoring project and set its default observation settings to use obscured geoprivacy and an urban garden habitat type.
tasks.name: Join a 2024 citywide pollinator monitoring project and set its default observation settings to use obscured geoprivacy and an urban garden habitat type.
tasks.description: Join a 2024 citywide pollinator monitoring project and set its default observation settings to use obscured geoprivacy and an urban garden habitat type.

tasks.instruction: Using map entry mode, create three new observations within the same city: one for a bird tagged 'backyard', one for a tree tagged 'street tree', and one for an insect tagged 'pollinator', each at different map locations.
tasks.name: Using map entry mode, create three new observations within the same city: one for a bird tagged 'backyard', one for a tree tagged 'street tree', and one for an insect tagged 'pollinator', each at different map locations.
tasks.description: Using map entry mode, create three new observations within the same city: one for a bird tagged 'backyard', one for a tree tagged 'street tree', and one for an insect tagged 'pollinator', each at different map locations.

tasks.instruction: From your observations that still need identification, edit the first one so its location precision is 100 meters and apply the top suggested plant species as the ID.
tasks.name: From your observations that still need identification, edit the first one so its location precision is 100 meters and apply the top suggested plant species as the ID.
tasks.description: From your observations that still need identification, edit the first one so its location precision is 100 meters and apply the top suggested plant species as the ID.

tasks.instruction: Using species filters, find flowering plants observed in a major New York City park during April 2023 and add the first two species in the list to an existing seasonal watchlist for spring 2023.
tasks.name: Using species filters, find flowering plants observed in a major New York City park during April 2023 and add the first two species in the list to an existing seasonal watchlist for spring 2023.
tasks.description: Using species filters, find flowering plants observed in a major New York City park during April 2023 and add the first two species in the list to an existing seasonal watchlist for spring 2023.

tasks.instruction: Submit a new observation for an invasive plant along a riverside trail today, mark the population as established, tag it with 'invasive' and 'management-needed', and flag it for urgent review.
tasks.name: Submit a new observation for an invasive plant along a riverside trail today, mark the population as established, tag it with 'invasive' and 'management-needed', and flag it for urgent review.
tasks.description: Submit a new observation for an invasive plant along a riverside trail today, mark the population as established, tag it with 'invasive' and 'management-needed', and flag it for urgent review.

tasks.instruction: Compare 2023 total species counts for a lakeside reserve hotspot and a nearby hilltop park hotspot, then follow the hotspot with the higher species richness and enable weekly summary notifications for it.
tasks.name: Compare 2023 total species counts for a lakeside reserve hotspot and a nearby hilltop park hotspot, then follow the hotspot with the higher species richness and enable weekly summary notifications for it.
